reviews.review_description: this game is so awesome and great and good

reviews.review_title: Interesting idea, but needs more to do
reviews.review_description:
I'll have to log some more time in this at some point, but first impression is that it's just okay. Gameplay is pretty good for ppl who suffer from VR motion sickness, bc you can just stand in one place and attack the oncoming bouncy balls. You do have to spin around 360 degrees though, so be aware of that. 

I like that it's so outside the box (mixing bouncy balls with knights), and I think adding some more of that creativity could really enhance the game. (Maybe some clever attack moves/weapons or unique characters or some way to interact with the world other than fighting, like gaining allies or collecting tokens.)

The game was enjoyable for a short time, but I don't see myself choosing it over other games often, or spending too much more time in it, so that's why the 2 stars.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I have since added a flail and polearm to the game, visual enhancements, two more leaderboards for the new weapons and more enemy variation. If you get time, I'd appreciate updated feedback if you play again.

reviews.review_title: Fun challenging game,  great working too
reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers of this simple fun game, I enjoy it. 
Allow to have different swords , use of bow and arrow is possible.   
I recommend this fun game for everyone to play.  The environment are beautiful and colorful.  If possible to allow the player to pick the level of wave to play with, so it doesn't  always start from the 1st level over again.  Thank you

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I have since added a flail and polearm to the game, visual enhancements, two more leaderboards for the new weapons and more enemy variation.

reviews.review_description: This game is really fun! I like trying to unlock every difficulty, skins, weapons, and also like trying to get on the leader board! I did have some glitches like unlocking a difficulty when I did not do whats required, or an enemy walking straight up. Also the discord link does not work. None of these were really that bad though and it's still really great! I really hope they still update the game.
I realy liek thies game I got a woreld reacored

developer_response.body: Congrats on becoming the flail champion!

reviews.review_description:
Love the game. But put in. Dual wielding, different shields and swords, spears, ECT.
It's fun but does not entice constantly.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I have since added a flail and polearm to the game, visual enhancements, two more leaderboards for the new weapons and more enemy variation. I'd like to see you play the game again and get your feedback!
